audit_status.source_base: Greek 3 John text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Complete one-chapter draft reviewed for Gaius, truth-walking, hospitality, Diotrephes domination, Demetrius witness.

verses.restored: The elder to beloved Gaius, whom I love in truth.
Beloved, concerning all things I pray that you prosper and be healthy, just as your soul/life prospers.
For I rejoiced greatly when siblings came and testified to your truth, just as you walk in truth.
I have no greater joy than these things: that I hear my children walking in truth.
Beloved, you do trustworthily whatever you work for the siblings, and this for strangers,
who testified to your love before the assembly. You will do beautifully/well sending them forward in a manner worthy of the Divine.
For on behalf of the Name they went out, taking nothing from the nations.
Therefore we ought to receive such ones, so that we may become coworkers with the truth.
I wrote something to the assembly, but Diotrephes, the one loving to be first among them, does not receive us.

Because of this, if I come, I will bring to remembrance his works that he does, talking nonsense against us with harmful words; and not content with these, he neither receives the siblings himself, and those wanting to he hinders and casts out of the assembly.
Beloved, do not imitate the harmful but the good. The one doing good is from the Divine; the one doing harm has not seen the Divine.
Demetrius has been testified to by all and by the truth itself; and we also testify, and you know that our testimony is true.
I had many things to write to you, but I do not wish to write to you through ink and reed.
But I hope to see you immediately, and we will speak mouth to mouth. Peace to you. The friends greet you. Greet the friends by name.

translation_notes: Diotrephes is an anti-domination example: loving to be first, refusing accountability, blocking hospitality, and casting people out.
Hospitality is active partnership with truth.
Gaius' health/soul blessing should not be turned into prosperity formula.
